treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient was still feeling anxious about admission, but calmer than prior.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient developed shaking chills and intermittent fevers.
Patient experienced nausea, lightheadedness, non-productive cough, vomiting, and decreased appetite.
Patient reported shortness of breath relieved with inhaler.
Rash described as small papules appeared.
Patient was given lorazepam 1 mg PO and 1 mg IV.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Pending test results will be followed up.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Uncertain as the cause of symptoms is not clear.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient felt much better at discharge, but unsure of the cause.
